creator: alex@i.org.ua
text:
(In reply to Zsolt Udvari from comment #6)
I've tried already. Didn't work in my jailed environment -- failing with another error.

With a bit of magic it may work with a docker server on remote Linux and docker client inside of jail. But, deeply in my mind, I understand it's not covered by FreeBSD Ports collection and automated ports tests.

Is any possibility to avoid 'make test' restriction?
